# Jordan Lee

## Summary
Operations-focused builder who improves internal tooling, documentation, and support workflows for small technical teams.

## Professional Experience

### Support Operations Specialist, ExampleSoft
2021-2024

- Built a ticket triage checklist used by 14 support teammates and reduced missed escalation notes by 32%.
- Shipped a Node.js reporting script that saved 6 hours of manual spreadsheet work each week.
- Worked on platform support and release coordination for internal operations teams.
- Improved onboarding docs for 5 new hires across support and QA.

### QA Coordinator, Demo Wallet Co.
2018-2021

- Managed weekly regression notes for mobile releases across iOS and Android.
- Created reproducible bug reports that helped engineers resolve 120 customer-impacting issues.
- Responsible for customer feedback tracking and internal status summaries.

## Skills

Node.js, JavaScript, QA workflows, support operations, documentation, release notes, ticket triage, automation

## Education

Example State University, B.A. Communications
